llm_instruction: This file contains only BASF jobs in Vietnam. Filter this file before loading wider Asia data. For role-specific searches, use the field JSON files when available. Copy job URLs exactly and never generate basf.jobs links.

jobs.title: Deputy Manager - Sales, Surface Treatment, Coatings
jobs.description: OBJECTIVES THE POSITION Manage sales of surface treatment business unit under the Chemetall® brand via direct and indirect distribution in assigned northern territories of VN aiming to generate sustainable sales growth for G-ECT SEA. Identify and exploit market potential as well as to explore and create customer needs to ensure profitable sales growth by new and existing technologies in new and existing customers. Take full sales responsibility for Northern Territories, the Sales Manager coordinates Surface Treatment activities for Industry and Automotive (OEM/Component Activities) and thereby acts as single point of contact (SPOC) for Segment Management APAC and Business Management SEA. MAIN AREAS OF RESPONSIBILITIES AND KEY ACTIVITIES Sales Management and Development: Explore and develop new business by high market presence in the field to ensure sustainable growth. Prepare, negotiate, and conclude business contracts and maintain business growth with customers. Ensure relationship management w/ all levels of seniority of customer organization (esp. key decider). Coordinate launch of new products at key customers aligned with Business Management and Marketing Provide trainings and

jobs.title: Sales Manager - Surface Treatment Vietnam
jobs.description: OBJECTIVES OF THE POSITION Segment: Cold forming (wire drawing, tube drawing, cold forging) Region: APAC (mainly China, India and SEA) Provide troubleshooting activities support new line start-ups Survey key/strategic accounts to provide continuous improvement suggestions and support MAIN AREAS OF RESPONSIBILITIES AND KEY ACTIVITIES Provide technical support, virtual and on-site for regional key/strategic customers in the APAC region – focus on cold forming (wire tube drawing; cold forging) (escalation function and back-up for local teams like tech. sales, TSS and Onsite if existing) Handle trouble shooting onsite including lab simulations of field scenarios in collaboration with Application team Support line audits Provide product recommendation Manage line starts especially for bath make-up calculation, initial parameter checks after, if necessary align with local teams on corrections/counter measures after first production Manage technical trainings in close collaboration with customers and sales teams Communicate with regional and global colleagues in English, being the link between local, regional and international colleagues Prepare and share trouble shooting experiences and

jobs.title: Deputy Manager - Sales, PU Footwear, Performance Materials
jobs.description: OBJECTIVES OF THE POSITION This role serves as the sales or local key account manager responsible for implementing the Value Chain hunting strategy, engaging with the VN team to identify potential polyurethane (PU) Footwear projects and secure new approvals. It involves establishing relationships with key shoe factories including Taiwanese, Korean and Chinese transplants (TTT/KTT/CTT) and acting as the local contact in VN to drive the PU business growth alongside the global and regional PU key account team. MAIN AREAS OF RESPONSIBILITIES AND KEY ACTIVITIES Key T1/T2s Collaborate with the VN team to explore new PU projects, scout potential from TTT/KTT/CTT transplants, and develop an account engagement plan for business expansion in VN. Monitor market trends, engage with customers, and understand our customers' sustainability objectives concerning footwear. Promote sustainable materials, generate new projects in partnership with the VN team, and execute top-down initiatives from customer HQ (e.g., BMB PU or recycled PU projects). Take responsibility for assigned PU business KPIs and targets in VN. Oversee the PU footwear customers in VN, focusing on building relationships with key c
